  And definitely i ll call my kid Jeffrey :))

subject: Hello
body:
Hey Jeffrey-

I just wanted to drop you a note to say hello and see how you're doing. I hope you're well and that things are beginning to settle. 

I'm just over a month into my new job and finding the learning curve steep. I've been getting rave reviews and many opportunities to work closely with private equity firms, consultants and city governments. The foundation has also approved a temporary relocation for me so I'll be moving down to Chapel Hill after the holiday's to really give this relationship with Porter a go. Depending on his job situation, we'll either be moving back to NY in June or onto somewhere yet to be determined.

I'd love to pop in again before then and see you. Let me know if you have some time.

Lots of love,

Andrea

 
Andrea Mitrovich
(917) 957-5341
AIM: andreamitrovich



__________________________________________________
Do You Yahoo!?
Tired of spam?  Yahoo! Mail has the best spam protection around 
http://mail.yahoo.com
body_html:
Hey Jeffrey-

I just wanted to drop you a note to say hello and see how you're doing. I hope you're well and that things are beginning to settle.

I'm just over a month into my new job and finding the learning curve steep. I've been getting rave reviews and many opportunities to work closely with private equity firms, consultants and city governments. The foundation has also approved a temporary relocation for me so I'll be moving down to Chapel Hill after the holiday's to really give this relationship with Porter a go. Depending on his job situation, we'll either be moving back to NY in June or onto somewhere yet to be determined.

I'd love to pop in again before then and see you. Let me know if you have some time.

Lots of love,

Andrea
